name: VaultSpark Football GM
currentFocus: Session 23 repaired beta-facing browser affordances, aligned Commissioner Mode UI/runtime contracts, completed the public contact/legal/agent metadata surface, and fixed the Pages artifact shape so canonical /vaultspark-football-gm/* routes receive slug-prefixed files.
nextMilestone: After the follow-up deploy completes, run public route smoke for /vaultspark-football-gm/contact.html, privacy.html, terms.html, agents.json, .well-known/llms.txt, and sitemap.xml; then re-check GitHub Pages certificate state before changing Launch Readiness.
blockers: GitHub Pages API still reports custom-domain certificate bad_authz/expired 2026-06-02. Session 23 fixed repo-side project-path route packaging; certificate remediation remains evidence-gated before public launch flip.

testSuiteStatus.coverage: Known default-shard inventory is 165 tests after Session 23 (core 54, runtime 83, sim-contract 22, sim-realism 1, studio 5). Session 23 also verified Playwright UI 9/9, Pages build, Pages smoke with root and slug-prefixed static route assertions, and post-push workflow status.

highlights: Priority Inbox (CRITICAL/IMPORTANT/FLAVOR tiers, bell badge, slide-in drawer)
Live Sim-Watch overlay (300ms animated drive log, key play cards)
Franchise Moment card (cinematic post-game drama + share button)
GM Decision modal (pre-advance choices on critical weeks)
Cap War Room (4-year visual cap timeline, color-coded risk zones)

Season Narrative Arcs (3 dynamic story threads per season)
GM Persona progress bar + confetti tier-up burst
SimJob TTL cleanup (10-min eviction, prevents OOM)
5 new API endpoints (season-arcs, gm-decision, records/franchise, team-archetypes, franchise-moment)
Mobile 375px overflow fixes across all new modals

passed: curl.exe -I https://vaultsparkstudios.com/vaultspark-football-gm/contact.html (pre-fix returned 404/fallback; build mirror fix added)

freeTierAuditNote: Verified S138 #753: pure browser game, no LLM/email/per-user backend calls. Static deploy.
